mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (title, content, author_id, category, published_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{category}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, author_id AS authorId, category, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM news WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, content, author_id AS authorId, category, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM news ORDER BY created_at DESC
